Quantum Construction and Remodeling LLC Reviews
2 out of 5 stars, based on
2
reviews
-
By Nicol G.April 17, 2021Deck$8,000
I had a bad experience with Quantum. They built our deck in August of 2020. At first they were pleasant but left the deck half done for weeks. I understand it was during Covid so we gave them the benefit of the doubt. We had the wire design installed but within weeks they started looking rusty. Repeated called Tyler and Quantum and was told that they would come back and look at it. After they received the last payment we never heard from them again. Now I have to pay another contractor to fix their mistakes. NEVER AGAIN. What happened when contractors took pride in their work.
-
AnonymousFebruary 23, 2015
Quality work, but read contract carefully! You will pay for lots of "extras" conveniently left out. Also beware of any contractor who doesn't want you around for the inspections.
